title: Verify coverage remains >= 90%
summary: Run the coverage check and ensure project coverage stays at or above 90% after updates removing workspace_root.
acceptance_criteria: Any coverage regressions are addressed or flagged.

steps.description: Run the project verification/coverage command to obtain the current coverage report.
If coverage dips, identify gaps and update tests to restore >= 90%.

notes: Use the project’s standard verification/coverage command.
repo_verify ran with warning: no known test/build targets detected (pytest not executed).
Keep output summaries concise; record only the coverage result and any adjustments made.
